subject: Cumulative and Survival Distribution Functions
question: Consider the random variable $X$ with survival distribution defined by $S(x) = \begin{cases} 1, & x < 0 \\ \frac{1}{10}(100-x)^2, & 0\le x\le 100 \\ 0, & x > 100 \end{cases}$ (a) Find the corresponding expression for the cumulative probability function. (b) Compute $\Pr(65 < X\le 75)$.
explanation: Answer: (a) We have $F(x) = \begin{cases} 0, & x < 0 \\ 1-\frac{1}{10}(100-x)^2, & 0\le x\le 100 \\ 1, & x > 100 \end{cases}$ (b) 0.092
